openid_empty_title: You don't have any OpenID applications.
openid_empty_subtitle: To add one, click the button below.
settings_openid_providers_subtitle: Manage external identity providers used for sign-in and directory synchronization.
settings_openid_providers_single_provide: We currently support only one external identity provider, but we plan to add support for multiple providers in the near future.
settings_openid_provider_google_service_: Upload a new service account key file to set the service account used for synchronization. NOTE: The uploaded file won't be visible after saving the settings and reloading the page because its contents are sensitive and are never sent back to the dashboard.
settings_openid_provider_create_account_: Automatically create an account on first sign-in with this external identity provider.
If enabled, Defguard automatically creates an account when a user signs in for the first time with this external identity provider. Otherwise, the account must be created by an administrator first.
settings_openid_provider_delete_confirm_: Are you sure you want to delete this external identity provider? This action cannot be undone.
settings_openid_provider_delete_failed: Failed to delete external identity provider
openid_consent_scope_profile: Know basic information from your profile.
openid_consent_scope_groups: Know what groups your are in.
